summary: tld-affinity inner SELECT...LIMIT 100 wrapped in IIFE with defer rows.Close() and rows.Err() zeroes partial counts.
reason: Missing rows.Err() let a mid-scan cursor error produce a misleadingly low historical-availability estimate. Missing defer meant a hypothetical panic from rows.Scan would leak the SQL connection from the pool.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes; per-iteration close path is now deterministic on any exit.
